title: agrostis humifusa
intro: Agrostis humifusa, also known as creeping bent or dwarf bent, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agrostis humifusa include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Agrostis humifusa can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
